001package net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.buttons;
002
003import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.button.Button;
004import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.menu.Menu;
005import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.util.MenuOpener;
006import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
007import org.bukkit.event.inventory.ClickType;
008import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
009
010import java.util.function.Supplier;
011
012public abstract class MenuButton implements Button {
013
014    private final Supplier<Menu> menuSupplier;
015
016    protected MenuButton(@NotNull Supplier<Menu> menuSupplier) {
017        this.menuSupplier = menuSupplier;
018    }
019
020    @Override
021    public void onClick(@NotNull Player clicker, @NotNull ClickType clickType) {
022        MenuOpener.open(menuSupplier.get(), clicker);
023    }
024}
